property.name: java.library.path

testcase.name: testRenderResultadosWeb
testcase.system-out:
19:38:36.811 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.saberpro.SaberproApplicationTests]: SaberproApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 19:38:36.935 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.saberpro.SaberProApplication for test class com.saberpro.SaberproApplicationTests 19:38:37.118 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
